violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. - Flat top was too far to the left and found not under the hood.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Shelfs in kitchen and coffee room need to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
